_source: Schneider ATV340 wiring diagram NVE97896-02, sheet 1/2. Ground-truth facts verified against the rendered page in docs/plans/2026-07-13-print-eval-gold-standard.md §3 + the professor review. Graded graph = the frozen defective extraction at printsense/fixtures/atv340/graph.json (a copy of internet_print_tests/schneider-atv340-vfd/extraction.json).
_truth_status_note: draft_llm_authored -> Mike reviews-and-freezes to frozen_human_confirmed (PRD §10.7). Only frozen truth blocks CI; the benchmark test skips until then.

structure.desc: DC bus PA/+ , PC/- at CN9
Safe Torque Off inputs on CN2

_correction_2026_07_14: Primary-source review (see fixtures/atv340/evidence_manifest.json). REMOVED three blockers: incorrect_connector_ownership (D1 CONTRADICTED — Install. Manual NVE61069.06 p.132 says CN3/ENC supports 'Digital encoder 5V RS422 A/B/I', so RS422 is not CN4-exclusive; rs422_encoder_link path deleted); variant_crossover (redundant with incompatible_functional_path — CN9 is not frame-variable, only PB's connector varies CN10 vs CN8; member_variants deleted); dangling_reference (require_refs_resolve=false — CN3 is a real connector, not a dangling defect; a generic reference check may run elsewhere as a NON-gating diagnostic). Five drawing/manual-confirmed blockers retained; the reduced set independently preserves import_verdict=FAIL. Score stays grader-derived (not forced).

expected_verdict.score_note: Emerges from rubric weights + honesty penalty; NOT hardcoded. See the benchmark test's asserted band. The two axes are independent by design: the graph's tag accuracy scores in the USEFUL_DRAFT band while the structural gates FAIL import — that separation is the thesis (good prose != trustworthy graph).
